jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Westside
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Westside! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Rajkot team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Westside:
Westside is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Westside!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
